
func (s *Server) handlePOSTRender(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	body, enableBgStream, disableRefresh, err := s.app.POSTRender()
	if err != nil {
		s.httpErrIntern(w, r, nil, "handling action App.Render", err)
		return
	}
	if err := s.writeHTML(
		w, r, nil, nil, body, nil,
	); err != nil {
		s.logErr("rendering response of App.POSTRender", err)
		return
	}
}
